ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "holdings" INTEGER /* Number of holdings for the document */,
  "editions" INTEGER /* Number of editions for the document */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the document's date range */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the document's date range */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the document */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the document belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., bill, hearing, committee report) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., veterans, taxation, education) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being tracked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the document */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the document */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations for the document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_usage_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, reader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "query_string" TEXT /* Search query string */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the search query (e.g., list of document IDs) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search query was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
